name: AlgoliaConnector
description: Connects to Algolia (search-as-a-service) to manage indexes, push and query objects, run keyword and federated searches, and curate synonyms + merchandising rules. Uses Algolia's official DSN-routed read host (`<app_id>-dsn.algolia.net`) and write host (`<app_id>.algolia.net`) with `algolianet.com` fallbacks for high availability.

install_fields.label: Application ID
install_fields.help: Found in Algolia Dashboard → API Keys → Application ID. A short uppercase alphanumeric string (e.g. 'LATENCY'). Sent on every request as the `X-Algolia-Application-Id` header.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Algolia Admin API Key (or a sufficiently-scoped key). Found in Algolia Dashboard → API Keys → Admin API Key. Treat as secret — Admin keys grant full read/write across the entire application. Sent on every request as the `X-Algolia-API-Key` header.

install_fields.label: Default Index
install_fields.help: Optional default index name. Surfaced to the dashboard as a hint — the connector does not auto-route to this index.

install_fields.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
install_fields.help: Per-request httpx timeout. The connector retries on transient failures, so this is a single-attempt cap.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates app_id + api_key by probing `GET /1/indexes`, then persists config.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probes `GET /1/indexes` (DSN-routed read host) as a lightweight liveness check.

apis.name: List Indexes
apis.description: GET /1/indexes — list every index on the Algolia application. Returns `{items, nbPages}`.

apis.name: Create / Replace Index Settings
apis.description: PUT /1/indexes/{name}/settings — replace all index settings. Algolia creates the index on the first settings push.

apis.name: Get Index Settings
apis.description: GET /1/indexes/{name}/settings — fetch the full settings object for an index.

apis.name: Save Object
apis.description: Upsert a single object. With `object_id` → `PUT /1/indexes/{name}/{id}` (overwrite). Without → `POST /1/indexes/{name}` (Algolia generates ID).

apis.name: Save Objects (Batch)
apis.description: POST /1/indexes/{name}/batch — bulk indexing. `action` one of addObject | updateObject | partialUpdateObject | partialUpdateObjectNoCreate | deleteObject.

apis.name: Get Object
apis.description: GET /1/indexes/{name}/{id} — fetch a single object. Optional `attributes` projection.

apis.name: Partial Update Object
apis.description: POST /1/indexes/{name}/{id}/partial — patch specific attributes. `create_if_not_exists` controls upsert vs strict-update semantics.

apis.name: Browse Index
apis.description: POST /1/indexes/{name}/browse — cursor-paginated full-index export. Pass `cursor` from each response to fetch the next page.

apis.name: Search Index
apis.description: POST /1/indexes/{name}/query — keyword search with optional filters + pagination.

apis.name: Multi-Index Search
apis.description: POST /1/indexes/*/queries — federated search across multiple indexes in one round-trip. Each request is `{indexName, query, ...}`.

apis.name: List Synonyms
apis.description: POST /1/indexes/{name}/synonyms/search — paginated synonym search with optional type filter.

apis.name: Save Synonym
apis.description: PUT /1/indexes/{name}/synonyms/{id} — upsert a synonym record. `forward_to_replicas` propagates to replica indexes.

apis.name: List Rules
apis.description: POST /1/indexes/{name}/rules/search — paginated search for merchandising rules.

apis.name: Save Rule
apis.description: PUT /1/indexes/{name}/rules/{id} — upsert a merchandising rule (condition + consequence).
